title: sparql slow if more object value specified
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, catId INTEGER, caDataType VARCHAR, showInView BOOLEAN, valFormat VARCHAR, multiple BOOLEAN, position INTEGER, link VARCHAR, catAttName VARCHAR, setting VARCHAR, flag BOOLEAN, caUnit VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO test_data (id, catId, caDataType, showInView, valFormat, multiple, position, link, catAttName, setting, flag, caUnit) VALUES (1, 1, 'type1', TRUE, 'format1', FALSE, 1, 'link1', 'name1', 'setting1', TRUE, 'unit1');

INSERT INTO test_data (id, catId, caDataType, showInView, valFormat, multiple, position, link, catAttName, setting, flag, caUnit) VALUES (2, NULL, 'type2', FALSE, 'format2', TRUE, 2, 'link2', 'name2', 'setting2', FALSE, 'unit2');
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE catId = 1 AND showInView = TRUE;
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE catId IS NULL OR catId > 0;
key_bug_features: Slow query performance with specific object value in SPARQL
